fragment.choose:
<when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("isStream","false").Equals("false", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))"> <set-variable name="responseBody" value="@(context.Response.Body.As(preserveContent: true))" />
@("ai-gateway-token-usage") <metadata name="appId" value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("appId", "unknown"))" /> <metadata name="useCase" value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("useCase", "unknown"))" /> <metadata name="apiRoute" value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("apiRoute", "unknown"))" /> <metadata name="apiRegion" value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("apiRegion", "unknown"))" />
<metadata name="deploymentName" value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("deployment-id", "none"))" /> <metadata name="backendId" value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("backendId", "default"))" /> <metadata name="routeLocation" value="@((string)context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("routeLocation", "none"))" />
<metadata name="promptTokens" value="@(((JObject)context.Variables["responseBody"])?["usage"]?["prompt_tokens"]?.Value().ToString() ?? "0")" /> <metadata name="completionTokens" value="@(((JObject)context.Variables["responseBody"])?["usage"]?["completion_tokens"]?.Value().ToString() ?? "0")" /> <metadata name="totalTokens" value="@(((JObject)context.Variables["responseBody"])?["usage"]?["total_tokens"]?.Value().ToString() ?? "0")" />
